    Technical source data

    MissionTypes:8H6_RJYXJkCi89K8raNQCw

    labelThe Ultimate Poison: Part 17 (0-0)
    titleThe Ultimate Poison: Part 17
    majorTypestatic
    descriptionReturn to Xhargregs Research station in Zergilin and check out the new wasps he discovered. (You can also pick up the Death Cloud)
    maxLvl0
    key8H6_RJYXJkCi89K8raNQCw
    tableMissionTypes
    mustBeInorderNo
    minLvl0
    completeDescriptionXhargreg: ”What do you think? Aren't these giant wasps amazing? Hmmm.. wonder if the mutagenic poison you brought back last time had anything to do with it... are you really sure you don't wanna try some? Oh, right, right, here you go, the Death Cloud… one of my finest creations… I hope you enjoy it! It was almost endurable to work with you… perhaps you could be of further use sometime in the future… once a way to re enter Fulzar has been discovered. Oh and if you encounter any Nezerians.. please do feel free to test the Death Cloud on them… Hehehehhrgrhghghgh..."
    addedBodies["8UX4ujQOAkChwhxVLE1ubw"]
    availableYes
    typetransport
    dropHukOu5ezKku59ldjPGCK4g
